vanilla-chocolate-cake-argiro.name: Vanilla Chocolate Cake
instructions: Butter and flour a round cake pan with a hole, with a diameter of 23 cm.
With a sieve, sift the flour in a bowl.
In the mixer's bowl, add the butter and beat for a minute to fluffy.
Add the sugar gradually and continue hitting at a high speed for another 3 to 4 minutes until it hangs.
Add the eggs one by one.
Lower the mixer speed to the lowest.
Add the vanilla, salt and a little bit the sifted flour.
Pour half the mixture into the vessel. Keep the other one aside.
Heat the milk a little and dissolve the cocoa in it.
Add the dissolved cocoa to the mixture we kept.
Mix it with a spoon, go everywhere and become dark.
We will bake the vanilla chocolate cake in a small round form of cake 20 million.
Pussy puppies, empty it in the cake form.
With a spoon mix gently and mix the dark with the light mixture.
Straighten the surface, baking at 170°C in a well preheated evening for about 55 minutes. Alternatively, baking in the air on the middle grill of the evening, at 160°C for about 50 minutes.
Before we take the juicy cake out of the oven, we need to check if it was cooked in his heart.
After the baking time, insert the blade of the knife into the center of the cake. If the blade comes out of dough then the cake is well cooked.

vareniki-lezzet.name: Vareniki
instructions: 1. Combining all materials for the dough and knead.
2. Leave the formed dough to rest on the edge.
3. Soup potatoes for rain in salty water.
4.  Brazilian potatoes with milk, salt & pepper; and flavor them by adding pepper.
5.   Take the oils in the pan and roast the onion to the color area.
6.  Add the curled onion into the potato mixture and leave the mortar to cool.
7.   Open dough and cut the rings.
8. Close by placing the mortar inside.
9.   Cook in boiling water.
10.   roast with onion powder sugar for service.
11. 11.   Serve onions and green onions on the skin.
12. Afiyet olsun.

veal-rib-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Veal Rib In The Oven
instructions: Place the veal rib on a tray and season with chopped garlic teeth, pepper paste, blonde leaf, white wine, olive oil, salt and pepper. Involve very well and let marinate for 30 minutes.
Light a pot with water and meat broth, boil until dissolved, remove from the fire and reserve.

Start the oven at 180 degrees. Peel the potatoes, cut them in half, add them to the meat tray, wrap them in the oven for 45 minutes. As you bake, water with your own sauce and meat broth. Then remove it from the oven and serve.

veal-with-eggplants-argiro.name: Veal With Eggplants

ingredients.item: 1 large potato cut into large frames
1 large potato cut into large frames

instructions: Cut the comb into large pieces, and dry it very well with absorbent paper. Add salt and pepper and mix to go everywhere.
In a wide pot, heat the olive oil in medium to strong intensity and add the beef on all sides for 6-7′ in total. Put it in a bowl and cover it.
Lower the heat and add the onion. Allow it to melt and with to 5-6′′ and add the garlic and the paste.
Sauté for 1′ and add the beef to the pot.
Turn up the intensity of the fire and put the wine out.
Add the tomatoes grated or chopped, the sugar, the spice, the bay leaf and warm water to cover the ingredients.
Simmer for 1 hour and 15 minutes until it softens.
In the end, add salt and pepper.
When the meat boils, add the baked eggplants, the potato and cover the pot.
Simmer for another 15 minutes.
Finally, sprinkle with the chopped parsley
Turn off the food and allow it to stand for 15′ to melt before serving.

veal-with-mushrooms-argiro.name: Veal With Mushrooms

ingredients.item: 4 peat (200 gr each trans or opposite)
4 peat (200 gr each trans or opposite)

instructions: Cut the sliced beef in half with a knife first.
In an anti-stick pan (without a fat substance) bake the meat 4 minutes on each side.
Add the olive oil and onions, garlic and mushrooms.
Add salt and pepper and mix.
Let them cook for 5 minutes until they drink their liquids.
Sprinkle the nutmeg and pour with the wine.
Let him drink all his fluids.
Finally sprinkle with parsley and serve.

vegan-carrot-soup-ever.name: Vegan Carrot Soup Ever
instructions: Heat vegan butter in a Dutch oven over medium heat until melted. Add vegetable broth, potato, carrots, onion, celery, and ginger; cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until potato is tender, about 30 minutes. Uncover soup and let cool, about 15 minutes.
Puree soup in batches in a food processor or high-speed blender until smooth.
Return soup to the Dutch oven; stir in coconut cream. Season with curry powder, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat until soup is heated through, about 10 minutes.

vegan-gingerbread-cupcakes-with-lemony-c.name: Vegan Gingerbread Cupcakes With Lemony Cream Cheese Frosting
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Line a muffin pan with paper cupcake liners.
Sift the flour, baking powder, baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, cloves, and salt into a bowl and mix.

Whisk the oil, molasses, maple syrup, soy milk, yogurt, and lemon zest in a separate large bowl. Add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and mix just until smooth. Fold in the chopped crystallized ginger.

Fill cupcake liners two-thirds full. Bake for 19 to 22 minutes, until a knife or toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Transfer to a cooling rack and let cool completely before frosting.

Cream together margarine and cream cheese until just combined. Use a handheld mixer to whip while adding the confectioners’ sugar in 1/2 cup batches. Mix until smooth and creamy, then in mix in the vanilla. Add the lemon zest. Keep tightly covered and refrigerated until ready to use.

vegan-protein-chips-argiro.name: Vegan Protein Chips
instructions: Preheat the evening to 200°C in the air.
In a bowl, mix the almond flour, coconut flour, salt, and paprika.
Add lukewarm water, oil and knead the ingredients until dough is formed (the dough is fragile, because it has no gluten which gives consistency). If necessary, add more water.
Place the dough between two sheets of parchment paper and use the molder, press until it becomes very thin.
Using a round coupat, cut the dough if you do not have a coupat, use the cap from a bottle.
Place the pieces in a baking pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 12 minutes or until golden on the edges.
Let them cool completely before serving.
Store the vegan chips left in an airtight container at room temperature for 3 to 5 days. If they lose their crunch, we can reheat them in the oven for a while before serving them.
The delicious options are endless as you can season them with spices of your liking.

vegan-puerto-rican-empanadas.name: Vegan Puerto Rican Empanadas
instructions: Combine water, TVP, and soy sauce in a large pan over high heat. Cook and stir until water is mostly evaporated. Reduce heat to medium. Add garlic, sazon, adobo sauce, oregano, and cumin. Continue cooking until TVP starts to firm up, about 5 minutes, increasing heat if necessary. Add cayenne and liquid smoke and cook until the mixture starts sticking to the pan, about 5 minutes. Stir in tomato paste and mix vegan meat well.

Mix flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda together in a large bowl. Make a well in the center and add water and 1/4 cup vegetable oil. Mix with your hands and knead until all flour is incorporated. Cut dough into 12 pieces and roll into balls. Place dough balls in the bowl and cover; let sit for 3 to 4 minutes. Roll a dough ball out into a 6-inch circle and fill with vegan meat and shredded cheese. Dip a finger in water and moisten the edges of the dough before folding over and crimping empanada edges using a fork. Repeat with remaining dough balls and fillings.

Heat 1 cup vegetable oil in a deep pan over medium-high heat. Add 2 or 3 empanadas as a time to the hot oil and fry until both sides are a light golden color, about 5 minutes total. Transfer fried empanadas to a plate lined with paper towels to absorb any excess oil.

veggie-almond-and-raisin-quinoa-salad.name: Veggie, Almond, And Raisin Quinoa Salad

ingredients.prep: white and light green parts, chopped

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spread almonds onto a baking sheet.
Bake almonds in the preheated oven until lightly toasted and fragrant, 5 to 10 minutes.

Bring vegetable stock and quinoa to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until quinoa is tender and stock has been absorbed, 15 to 20 minutes. Transfer quinoa to a bowl and refrigerate until chilled, about 30 minutes.
Mix almonds, cucumber, tomatoes, parsley, orange bell pepper, feta cheese, raisins, olives, and scallions into quinoa.
Whisk lemon juice and olive oil together in a bowl; pour over quinoa mixture and stir until quinoa mixture is coated.

vinegar-meatballs-recipe-lezzet.name: Vinegar Meatballs Recipe
instructions: 1. Sparkling, grated onion, eggs, nuts and bread.
2. Walnut murallot and rest.
3. In the pan fry with less fat.
4. In separation pan, boil paste, water and vinegar.
5. KöFelts add this sauce and cook in 10–15 minutes jealous fire.
